note: Animal Forest (Doubutsu no Mori, N64 JP) matched functions. Sources are EUC-JP + asm-processor; only the ASCII C bodies of MATCHED functions are copied verbatim. Project headers do NOT preprocess under host /usr/bin/cpp (Apple clang traditional-mode chokes on include/attributes.h [[...]] attributes), so we use headers:[] and put minimal type/extern decls in each prependC.

functions.prependC: typedef struct { unsigned int w0; unsigned int w1; } Gfx;

typedef unsigned int size_t;
